events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete. The clearance deficiency is a manufacturer-instruction violation enforced via IMC/IRC M1401, so I marked it `fail` with `high` risk — inadequate clearance causes discharge-air recirculation, elevated head pressure, and blocked service access. Findings and corrective actions (reset unit/relocate obstruction, re-verify against the specific clearance diagram, halt closeout until fixed) are written to `/app/answer.json`.
